summary: Excellent soundboard recording with stellar performances, highlighted by a superb Bobby McGee and a hot Pigpen harmonica on Big Boss Man.
review: Both reviewers rave about the crystal‑clear audio and high‑energy set, calling it a must‑listen gem. The show shines especially on Bobby McGee and the fiery Pigpen harp solo during Big Boss Man, making this one of the best 1971 recordings available.

ai_rating.rationale: All reviews (2) give 5‑star ratings and praise both the performance and sound quality, but the small sample size limits confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the audio as crystal‑clear, crisp, and one of the best they've heard; no issues noted.

show_quality.setlist_flow: High‑energy performance with tight transitions; the band is described as ‘rockin’ and inspiring throughout.

band_member_comments.Keys: Pigpen's harmonica (harp) on Big Boss Man is highlighted as hot and inspirational.
